description: Get dressed in these heels from catwalk for a glammed up look. The patent look straps with the gold edges lends a dose of sophisticated style to your look, making this pair a must have in your wardrobe. Upper Patent leather look strappy uppers for durability and comfort Patent leather look straps with golden edges over the forefoot and criss-crossed over the midfoot for added style Elastic band at the back of the ankle for a snug Fit Midsole synthetic leather covered footbed for added style and durability Outsole Weathered look TPU outsole with heel Patterned grooves on the forefoot and textured surface on the heel for added grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
